title: Raising and Handling Exceptions
description: Practice raising exceptions with descriptive messages, validating inputs, computing safe operations, and enforcing types using built-in exception types.
hints: Use 'raise ValueError(message)' to raise with a descriptive message
Check isinstance() before performing operations to catch type errors early
Use f-strings in error messages to include the invalid value
n ** 0.5 computes the square root without importing math
Validate boundary conditions: negative numbers, out-of-range values
Return the validated value so callers can use it in expressions

testCases.description: Test validate_positive with valid positive number
Test validate_range with value in range
Test validate_positive raises ValueError for negative
Test safe_sqrt raises ValueError for negative input
